message:
fix: make prefix detection resilient to malformed lines

Change detect_prefix_from_jsonl to skip problematic lines (IO errors,
malformed JSON, missing ID) rather than aborting early. This prevents
falling back to default "bd" prefix when there's a single corrupt line
before valid issues.

Uses let-else pattern for cleaner control flow and explicit continue
on each error case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
